title: The Fleet Takes Shape — Part 2
description: The grateful allied captains gather around Luffy and prepare to follow him.
scene: On pages 7–11, Trafalgar Law, Bartolomeo, Sai, Colosseum Fighters, Straw Hat Pirates gather after Dressrosa and the future Straw Hat Grand Fleet begins to take shape.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Dofla- Mingo...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: is a violent, mercless man.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I won't let him sully dressrossa with his hands!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Grunt Grunt

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: vicinity of the Eastern Port

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Once upon a time, a certain marine died.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Cough whereze

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: He held a special place in my heart.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Do you not have any rela- lives?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: "We met when he was but a child... I thought of him as my son.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Truthfully, he had a sense of justice a bit stronger than your average person's... he was also a trustworthy subordinate.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: just once in all his life did he lie to me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Reporting from Minion Island.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: We've found the body of a donquixote family executive among the casualties here...

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: Code- name's Corazon. Sending visual now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Rosinante!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Why are you on that island!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: I had been betrayed... but for a valid reason, I suspected.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: During the incident that day, four things vanished...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: the barrels pirate crew. My subordinate's life. The ope ope no mi...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: And the boy with white lead syndrome, who was at the time part of the Donquixote family.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Ahh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: That's me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: I surmised as much.

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: So it was for your sake that Rosinate abandoned his mission for half a year?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Yes. He took me to hospital after Hos-Pital...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: and in reaching for the ope ope no mi...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: In an attempt to cure you, it cost him his life!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Anyone become

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Tell me! I want to know exactly why he died!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Yes! That's exactly right! We were supposed to run away together!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: I owe that man my life and my heart! He was in every sense of the word my Savior!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: That's why I've lived for the day I could take Doflamingo's head, in his stead!

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: But I wonder if that's being the kind of D that Corazon hoped I would be.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: D?

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: Just like Straw Hat... I too have that hidden name!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Do you know anything about it? About D?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: Can't say...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: But I can tell you that Rosinante knew very little, if anything at all about it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: So here we have another... Those of the "D" always lead a life steeped in tragedy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Meaning he almost certainly didn't save you for your name.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Don't sully his love with imagined requirements or conditions!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Oi, law!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: Love ya, bro!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: If I was still serving, I'd have you thrown in the clapper,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: and question you at length at my leisure.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: to think that the only person with whom I'd be able to share my memories of Rosinate...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: Would be you, a pirate!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: If you really must do something in his stead,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: Remember him. Let us both never forget him.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: That alone is enough.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: "Just keep on living..."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: He'd have said something similar were he still here, no?

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Grunt Grunt

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: What the-!?

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Grunt Grunt

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: This is...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: The debris is flying up into the sky!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #51
dialogue.text: OH MY SWEET MOTHER!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #52
dialogue.text: Not like this!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #53
dialogue.text: that bastard, don't tell me he...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #54
dialogue.text: He intends to use those things as weapons!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #55
dialogue.text: Hiya hoho! This is going to leave a mark.

summary: This part shows the Dressrosa allies trying to define their bond with Luffy, while Luffy resists formal command and keeps his freedom at the center.
